title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Blockchain Credibility Standard Lab
subtitle: No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement.
iconicLines: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.
No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement.
Do not just move value. Prove it was earned.

scenarios.label: DAO grant payout
scenarios.headline: No grant payout without a proof package.
scenarios.objective: Require milestone evidence, reviewer validation, and a signed receipt before treasury funds are released.

scenarios.label: Protocol upgrade
scenarios.headline: No upgrade without replayable proof and rollback authority.
scenarios.objective: Bind each upgrade to test evidence, simulation results, audit remediation, risk boundaries, and human release authority.
scenarios.settlementRule: No replay and rollback plan, no release.

scenarios.label: Audit remediation
scenarios.headline: No fixed claim without evidence that the finding is actually resolved.
scenarios.objective: Map audit findings to code changes, tests, reviewer decisions, residual risk, and acceptance receipts.
scenarios.settlementRule: No finding-to-fix trace, no remediation credit.

scenarios.label: AI-agent work
scenarios.headline: No autonomous-agent payment without a ProofBundle.
scenarios.objective: Make agent output settlement-ready only after scope, trace, evidence, validation, and human authority are complete.
scenarios.valueAtStake: agent rewards and future work allocation

scenarios.label: RWA / external claim
scenarios.headline: No real-world claim without provenance and review.
scenarios.objective: Turn off-chain claims into public-safe commitments, provenance records, review decisions, and revocable receipts.
scenarios.settlementRule: No provenance and challenge window, no maturity promotion.

scenarios.label: Treasury vendor spend
scenarios.headline: No vendor payment without clear acceptance.
scenarios.objective: Convert invoices, deliverables, acceptance criteria, reviewer notes, and client signoff into a settlement-ready record.
scenarios.settlementRule: No signed acceptance receipt, no settlement signal.

proofGates.name: Validation
proofGates.question: What passed, failed, or remains uncertain?

candidates.name: Announcement-only credibility
candidates.summary: The project claims success, but provides no mission contract, evidence docket, replay path, risk ledger, or receipt.

candidates.name: Dashboard and commit credibility
candidates.summary: Useful signals exist, but claims are scattered across dashboards, commits, chats, and announcements without acceptance authority.
candidates.reason: Evidence exists, but it is not packaged for decision or settlement.

candidates.name: Audit badge credibility
candidates.summary: A third-party badge exists, but remediation trace, residual risk, and release authority are incomplete.
candidates.reason: A badge helps, but unresolved evidence and rollback gaps block full readiness.

candidates.name: GoalOS proof-package credibility
candidates.summary: Mission, evidence, replay, validation, risk, human signoff, receipt, and settlement signal are all present in a public-safe package.
candidates.reason: Proof is structured, reviewable, replayable, human-authorized, and settlement-ready.

stakeholders.name: Users
stakeholders.demand: Show the proof before asking for trust.

stakeholders.name: DAOs
stakeholders.demand: Show the Evidence Docket before treasury funds move.

stakeholders.name: Foundations
stakeholders.demand: Show milestone proof before grants close.

stakeholders.name: Auditors
stakeholders.demand: Show finding-to-fix trace before remediation claims mature.

stakeholders.name: Validators
stakeholders.demand: Show replay and rollback readiness before upgrades.

stakeholders.name: Enterprises
stakeholders.demand: Show signed acceptance records before adoption.

stakeholders.name: Investors
stakeholders.demand: Show proof of execution, not only narrative traction.

boundary.claimBoundary: Synthetic browser-local public demonstration only. It does not include wallet use, token approval, transaction broadcasting, fund movement, legal/financial/investment advice, external fact certification, or live settlement activation.
boundary.publicRule: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.
